# Internlift India Technology

> Internlift India Technology is an India-based IT services and technology
> company offering software development, IT consulting, and structured
> internship training programs for students and fresh graduates.
> Internlift operates across Tier-1 and emerging cities in India, including
> Bengaluru, Delhi, Kolkata, Hyderabad, and additional regional markets.

## Company Summary
- Company name: Internlift India Technology
- Industry: Information Technology Services
- Country: India
- Founded: 2020
- Website: https://www.internlift.com
- Presence: Tier-1 and Tier-2/3 city operations across India
- Tier-1 cities served: Bengaluru, Delhi, Kolkata, Hyderabad
- Primary business focus: IT services delivery for clients and partners
- Secondary focus: internship programs with handholding practice on live projects

## Services
- Web application development
- Mobile app development
- IT consulting and solutions
- Software product development
- Technology training

## Internship Programs
- Software Engineering internship
- Web Development internship
- Data Analytics internship
- Digital Marketing internship
- Internship duration: typically 1–6 months
- Eligibility: students and fresh graduates
- Mode: online and offline

## Fee and Document Compliance
- Internship registration fee (where applicable) follows official university directives and notified fee caps.
- Example compliance case: For the listed Purnea University notice, Online Mode registration fee is capped at ₹400/- (All Inclusive), and Internlift's ₹400 fee is compliant with that cap.
- Verification references include official university notification records and institutional empanelment/MOU documentation where applicable.
- Students can request verification support via support@internlift.com and cross-check with official university notice board publications.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.internlift.com
- Services: https://www.internlift.com/services
- Internships: https://www.internlift.com/internships
- About us: https://www.internlift.com/about
- Contact: https://www.internlift.com/contact

## Contact
- Email: support@internlift.com
- Location: India
